name: rolepod
description: Coordinated software-house team for AI coding CLIs — 18 specialist agents, Core 10 phase skills (1 router + 9 phase), 6-phase lifecycle. Pre-commit gates (S1-S5 simplicity / T1-T6 testing / F1-F5 failure-mode) catch bugs before ship. On Claude Code, ships as a pure marketplace plugin (agents / skills / commands / hooks) — the always-on judgment core is delivered by a SessionStart hook, so install and uninstall touch no global config. See https://github.com/nuttaruj/rolepod.
